# admanager_ad_unit (Data Source)

Reads a single Google Ad Manager [ad unit](https://developers.google.com/ad-manager/api/beta/reference/rest/v1/networks.adUnits) by either `ad_unit_id` or `ad_unit_code`. Exactly one of the two must be set.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up a single ad unit. Set EXACTLY ONE of ad_unit_id or ad_unit_code.

# By ID: a bare numeric ad unit ID (expanded against the configured network)...
data "admanager_ad_unit" "by_id" {
  ad_unit_id = "123456789"
}

# ...or a full resource name.
data "admanager_ad_unit" "by_name" {
  ad_unit_id = "networks/123456/adUnits/123456789"
}

# By ad serving code (exact match).
data "admanager_ad_unit" "by_code" {
  ad_unit_code = "homepage_leaderboard"
}

output "homepage_status" {
  value = data.admanager_ad_unit.by_code.status
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `ad_unit_code` (String) Look up the ad unit by its exact ad serving code. Exactly one of `ad_unit_id` or `ad_unit_code` must be set.
- `ad_unit_id` (String) Look up the ad unit by ID: either a bare numeric ad unit ID (expanded against the configured network) or a full resource name `networks/{network_code}/adUnits/{ad_unit_id}`. Exactly one of `ad_unit_id` or `ad_unit_code` must be set.

### Read-Only

- `applied_adsense_enabled` (Boolean) AdSense enablement applied directly to this ad unit. Null when inherited.
- `applied_teams` (List of String) Resource names of Teams applied directly to this ad unit.
- `description` (String) A description of the ad unit.
- `display_name` (String) The display name of the ad unit.
- `effective_adsense_enabled` (Boolean) The resolved AdSense enablement, inherited from ancestors when not set directly.
- `effective_target_window` (String) The resolved target window, inherited from ancestor ad units.
- `explicitly_targeted` (Boolean) Whether the ad unit must be targeted explicitly by line items. Ad Manager 360 only.
- `external_set_top_box_channel_id` (String) The set-top-box video-on-demand channel this ad unit maps to. Deprecated in the API.
- `has_children` (Boolean) Whether the ad unit has any child ad units.
- `id` (String) The full resource name of the ad unit: `networks/{network_code}/adUnits/{ad_unit_id}`.
- `parent_ad_unit` (String) Resource name of the parent ad unit: `networks/{network_code}/adUnits/{ad_unit_id}`. Null for the root ad unit.
- `refresh_delay` (String) The auto-refresh duration (e.g. `30s`) for mobile-app ad units. Null when the ad unit does not refresh.
- `sizes` (Attributes List) The sizes that can be served inside this ad unit. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sizes))
- `smart_size_mode` (String) The smart size mode: one of `NONE`, `SMART_BANNER`, `DYNAMIC_SIZE`.
- `status` (String) The status of the ad unit: `ACTIVE`, `INACTIVE`, or `ARCHIVED`.
- `target_window` (String) The target window applied directly to this ad unit (`TOP` or `BLANK`). Null when inherited.
- `teams` (List of String) Resource names of all Teams on this ad unit, including those inherited from ancestors.
- `update_time` (String) The time the ad unit was last modified (RFC 3339).

<a id="nestedatt--sizes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sizes`

Read-Only:

- `companions` (Attributes List) Companion sizes, present only for `VIDEO_PLAYER` sizes. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sizes--companions))
- `environment_type` (String) The serving environment: `BROWSER` or `VIDEO_PLAYER`.
- `height` (Number) Height of the size.
- `size_type` (String) The size type: one of `PIXEL`, `ASPECT_RATIO`, `INTERSTITIAL`, `IGNORED`, `NATIVE`, `FLUID`, `AUDIO`.
- `width` (Number) Width of the size.

<a id="nestedatt--sizes--companions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sizes.companions`

Read-Only:

- `height` (Number) Height of the companion size.
- `size_type` (String) The companion size type.
- `width` (Number) Width of the companion size.
